description: Logistics and parcel delivery service contract — tracking, shipment creation, rate quoting, and pickup scheduling. First implementer: Australia Post blade MCP.

operations.description: Get tracking detail for a tracking number (status, events, ETA, last known location)
operations.name: tracking_get

operations.description: List shipments currently being tracked under the account
operations.name: tracking_list

operations.description: Subscribe to push updates for a tracking number (webhook or polling cursor)
operations.name: tracking_subscribe

operations.description: List shipments created by the account
operations.name: shipment_list

operations.description: Get full detail of a single shipment (parcels, addresses, services, labels, status)
operations.name: shipment_get

operations.description: Create a shipment / consignment (sender, receiver, parcels, service options)
operations.name: shipment_create

operations.description: Retrieve shipping label artefact (PDF / PNG / ZPL) for a shipment
operations.name: label_get

operations.description: Quote rates for a from/to/parcel set across available services
operations.name: rate_quote

operations.description: Validate a postal address (DPID / suburb / postcode confirmation)
operations.name: address_validate

title: logistics-v1
